InstructionData.Title: Atmosphere Cooler 1
InstructionData.Author: Unknown
InstructionData.Instructions:
#################################################### # Atmosphere Cooler 1 ####################################################
alias WasteTank d0 alias ToCooling d1 alias FromCooling d2 alias ToFiltration d3
alias isCool r1 alias isHot r2 alias isFlushing r3
define FlushPumps -321403609 define PipeAnalyzers 435685051 define TargetTemp 308 # 35c
loop: jal checkTemp jal updateDevices jal updateFiltration j loop
#--------------------------------------------------- checkTemp: l r0 WasteTank Temperature slt isCool r0 TargetTemp snez isHot isCool sne isHot isCool 1
lb r0 PipeAnalyzers TotalMoles Sum sgtz isFlushing r0
#s db Setting isFlushing
j ra
#--------------------------------------------------- updateDevices: s ToCooling On isHot s FromCooling On isHot s ToFiltration On isCool
and r0 isCool isFlushing sb FlushPumps On r0 #s db Setting r0
j ra
#--------------------------------------------------- updateFiltration: yield j ra
